plugins.name: agent-cowork
plugins.description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering three areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support, resolves paths/URLs from .gitmodules with no separate config file); (3) agent context handoff brief generation — handoff (ephemeral brief Markdown for cross-agent or cross-teammate task transfer).

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack), my-backend-architecture (Progressive-Disclosure knowledge skill for a personal FSD-inspired backend architecture with NestJS-centric examples; covers layer dependency rules, slice boundaries, ORM strategies for TypeORM/Drizzle/Prisma, DIP patterns, and static module-boundary enforcement tooling).

plugins.name: ddd-workshop
plugins.description: DDD pipeline with four paired skills covering domain learning, Big Picture EventStorming, Process Modeling + BC Discovery, and an implementation-time protocol. Skills 1-3 are explicitly invoked discovery tools; skill 4 is a one-time installer whose output lives in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md as persistent context. (1) domain-classroom — teaches general industry patterns of an unfamiliar domain in lecture mode, grounded in cognitive-science 8 principles. Output: docs/learning-notes/{domain}-classroom.md. (2) bigpicture — 1:1 analytic tool for Big Picture EventStorming. Maps general patterns + client materials into the canonical Big Picture artifact (time-ordered events, phases, actors, external systems, hotspots, pivots). Phase-by-phase analytic accumulation. Domain-event 4-criteria gate. Korean natural-language + Code Identifier dual notation. Output: docs/eventstorming/ folder from the start (index.md + per-phase {NN-phase}/bigpicture.md), reserving a place for later workflow .md to join the same phase folder. (3) process-modeling — picks one phase from bigpicture and unfolds it into end-to-end workflows. Adds Command(blue)/Policy(lilac)/Read Model(green)/Aggregate candidates/alternative paths. One workflow = one .md inside the phase folder. Cross-phase workflows use the owner-phase rule (truth in one place, links from others). Bidirectionally updates bigpicture when new hotspots or BC candidates surface. In-place phase-folder migration if bigpicture is in flat .md form. Closing activity: BC Discovery mode — after enough workflows accumulate, clusters Aggregate/Linguistic/Policy/External/ReadModel/Transactional 6 signals into BC candidates, runs a discussion, and persists the decision as an immutable ADR (docs/adr/{NNNN}-bc-split-{domain}.md). Code module mapping and source code authoring are explicitly out of scope. Initial/Update/Cycle/BC-Discovery 4 modes — repeatable after code is written. (4) implementation-protocol — one-time installer (not invocable per use) that persists a design-aligned coding workflow into AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md. Per work unit (issue/ticket/feature): read relevant design docs (bigpicture, process-modeling, ADR) → check if implementation fits design scope → in-scope: plan and code / out-of-scope: discuss with user, update design docs first, then code. Never touches Git workflow, issue tracking, PR policy, CI/CD, or testing — slots into existing workflow sections, or creates a new section if none. Conflicting workflow rules surface user choices (replace / partial edit / abort). Track A/B auto-detected. Graceful degradation when some design artifacts are missing. Install/Merge/Update/Conflict 4 modes. Once installed, every coding session auto-follows the protocol via persistent context engineering.

plugins.name: fsd-workshop
plugins.description: FSD (Feature-Sliced Design) workshop pipeline — 3 conversational skills for planning FSD architecture from requirements before UI or code is written. requirements-analyzer (1/3: extract pages, routes, user roles; produces fsd-blueprint.md skeleton), structure-planner (2/3: layout zones, shared/ui candidates, widgets candidates, authentication design), framework-adapter (3/3: maps FSD plan to framework-specific folder structure — Next.js, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Angular). Single evolving fsd-blueprint.md refined by each skill.
